violations.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
violations.help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element

violations.description: Ensure ARIA attributes are not prohibited for an element's role
violations.help: Elements must only use permitted ARIA attributes

violations.description: Ensure elements with ARIA roles have all required ARIA attributes
violations.help: Required ARIA attributes must be provided

violations.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
violations.help: Heading levels should only increase by one

violations.description: Ensure image alternative is not repeated as text
violations.help: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
